feedback.Comments: Fair price, no surprises, and the crew lead walked us through everything. Highly recommend.
Handled the entire insurance claim for us after the June hail storm. Couldn't be easier.
feedback.Response: Thank you for trusting Summit Ridge with your roof!

feedback.Comments: Roof is fine but there was a mix-up on the shingle color we had to sort out.
feedback.Response: Thanks for the feedback — our PM reached out to make it right.

feedback.Comments: Happy with the result. Wish the office had returned calls a bit faster.
feedback.Response: Thank you for trusting Summit Ridge with your roof!

feedback.Comments: Handled the entire insurance claim for us after the June hail storm. Couldn't be easier.
feedback.Response: Thank you for trusting Summit Ridge with your roof!

feedback.Comments: Crew showed up on time and finished our reroof in a single day. Yard was spotless afterward.
Best contractor we've worked with in the Twin Cities. Cleaned up every last nail.
